ops.title: Fix TestColdStartTwoProcess: ccs status --json emits empty output
ops.description: CI integration job red on main since 1422b8f4 (a docs-only guides commit — provably unrelated: git diff e762e501..1422b8f4 touches only .claude/fragments/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/lock, zero Go/Rust source). Failure: coldstart_test.go:80 'decode `ccs status --json`: unexpected end of JSON input' with empty output. Reproduces locally at main (2/2 CI + 1/1 local: cd crates && cargo build -p ccs-proxy; cd go && go test -tags integration -run TestColdStartTwoProcess ./internal/integration/). Last green CI at e762e501 (refactor(supervisor): own proxy lifecycle state) — but that refactor is the most recent code change before the redness; suspect the supervisor refactor left a window where status.json is missing/empty on cold start and `ccs status --json` prints nothing instead of failing loudly.

ops.text: TestColdStartTwoProcess green locally and in CI
ccs status --json never prints empty output (error or valid JSON)
